raspberrypi-boot-bmp085/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version to 2.4.5 to support Java 11 and modernize the build configuration.
raspberrypi-boot-bmp085/pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 1.4.x does not support Java 11; upgrading is required to compile and run on the target JDK.

raspberrypi-boot-bmp085/pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java source and target version property from 1.8 to 11.
raspberrypi-boot-bmp085/pom.xml.why_exists: The project must target Java 11 to utilize features and libraries compatible with the new JDK version.
Older versions of pi4j may not be compatible with Java 11 or the updated Spring Boot environment.

raspberrypi-boot-bmp085/pom.xml.general_idea: Remove the explicit guava dependency declaration.
Update the project version from 1.0.0-SNAPSHOT to 1.2.0-SNAPSHOT.

raspberrypi-boot-bmp085/src/main/java/de.general_idea: Remove the execution of the Spring application context in the main method.
Add I2CFactory.UnsupportedBusNumberException to the catch block to handle potential exceptions from I2CFactory.getInstance().close().
Simplify the method body by removing an unnecessary intermediate variable assignment.
Refactor MQTT connection setup to use MqttConnectOptions object instead of direct setter calls on the factory.

raspberrypi-boot-gdata/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version to 2.4.5 to support Java 11 and modernize the build configuration.
raspberrypi-boot-gdata/pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 1.4.x does not support Java 11; upgrading is required to compile and run on the target JDK.

raspberrypi-boot-gdata/pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property to 11 to align with the target JDK.
raspberrypi-boot-gdata/pom.xml.why_exists: The project must target Java 11 to utilize its features and ensure compatibility with the upgraded dependencies.

raspberrypi-boot-gdata/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Guava dependency to 30.1.1-jre to ensure compatibility with Java 11.
raspberrypi-boot-gdata/pom.xml.why_exists: Older versions of Guava may have runtime issues or lack support for Java 11 modules/features.

raspberrypi-boot-gdata/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Paho MQTT client to 1.2.5 to fix connection issues and ensure Java 11 compatibility.
raspberrypi-boot-gdata/pom.xml.why_exists: Older versions may have known connection bugs or lack full Java 11 support.

raspberrypi-boot-gdata/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Google API Services OAuth2 to v2-rev20200213-1.31.0 for updated API support.
raspberrypi-boot-gdata/pom.xml.why_exists: Older API versions may be deprecated or incompatible with newer Google services.

raspberrypi-boot-gdata/pom.xml.general_idea: Bump project version to 1.2.0-SNAPSHOT to reflect the significant upgrade.

raspberrypi-boot-gdata/src/main/java/de/.general_idea: Remove the explicit .web(false) call from SpringApplicationBuilder to align with Spring Boot 2.4+ defaults where the application type is auto-detected.
Refactor MQTT connection setup to use MqttConnectOptions and fix password type to char array.
raspberrypi-boot-gdata/src/main/java/de/.why_exists: The setPassword method in MqttConnectOptions expects a char[] argument; passing a String causes a compile-time error due to type mismatch.

raspberrypi-boot-pushover/src/main/java/.general_idea: Remove the deprecated .web(false) call from SpringApplicationBuilder to align with Spring Boot 2.4+ conventions where web application type is auto-detected.
Refactor MQTT connection setup to use MqttConnectOptions and fix password type to char array.
raspberrypi-boot-pushover/src/main/java/.why_exists: The setUserName and setPassword methods on DefaultMqttPahoClientFactory were deprecated or removed in newer Spring Integration versions, requiring the use of setConnectionOptions with an MqttConnectOptions instance. Additionally, setPassword expects a char[] rather than a String.

raspberrypi-boot-pushover/src/main/java/.general_idea: Add missing import for MqttConnectOptions class.
raspberrypi-boot-pushover/src/main/java/.why_exists: Compilation error: cannot find symbol class MqttConnectOptions.

raspberrypi-boot-pushover/src/main/java/.general_idea: Remove commented-out code line for setting a device on the Pushover message builder.
Translate German error log message to English.
raspberrypi-boot-pushover/src/main/java/.before: logger.error("Pushover Nachricht konnte nicht erstellt und versendet werden. ", e);
raspberrypi-boot-pushover/src/main/java/.after: logger.error("could not create Pushover message. ", e);

raspberrypi-boot-pushover/src/main/java/.general_idea: Translate German info log message to English and correct the message text to match the context.
raspberrypi-boot-pushover/src/main/java/.before: logger.info("Pushover Nachricht wurde erfolgreich erstellt und versendet. {}", result.toString());
raspberrypi-boot-pushover/src/main/java/.after: logger.info("could not create Pushover message: {}", result.toString());
